security.title: Five reasons why you no go trust anybody.
security.subtitle: We remove every way we fit harm you. Wetin remain na code, we publish am, lock am, and people wey no work for us don verify am.
security.reason1Title: Smart Contract wey nobody fit change
security.reason1Body: The contract don deploy and dem don renounce am. No admin keys, no upgrade proxy, no pause function. Even the founders no fit change am.
security.reason2Body: Yield dey come from protocol-owned liquidity pools — no be from new deposits. The math still dey work even if no new members join.
security.reason3Body: Ownership don renounce when dem deploy am. No wallet fit drain funds, freeze accounts, or change parameters.
security.reason4Body: The full contract source dey published and verified for BscScan. Anybody fit read every line before dem deposit any dollar.
security.reason5Body: We put $100,000 USDT for table for anybody wey find real vulnerability. Open to all, no NDA, payment go happen within 7 days after verification.
security.metaTitle: TurboLoop Security — Smart Contract wey nobody fit change & $100K Bounty
security.metaDesc: TurboLoop smart contract immutable, renounced, and open source. No admin keys, no upgrade proxy. $100,000 USDT bounty dey for verified vulnerabilities.

social-wall.submitBody: You make TurboLoop video? Share the link — approved submissions go show here within 48 hours and fit qualify for Creator Star payouts.
social-wall.refreshNote: Featured picks first · e dey refresh every 5 minutes
social-wall.emptyBody: Be the first to land here — submit your TurboLoop video and the team go approve am within 48 hours.

ecosystem.title: Six pillar. One engine.
ecosystem.subtitle: TurboLoop no be only one product — na six DeFi primitives wey dey work together as one self-sustaining flywheel. Each one dey support di oda dem.
ecosystem.pillar1Body: Fixed-term USDT deposits wey dey generate daily yield. Choose 30, 60, or 90-day plans. Principal dey locked; earnings fit compound or you fit withdraw am daily.
ecosystem.pillar2Body: 12% for Level 1 referrals, 3% for Level 2. Dem go pay you sharp-sharp in USDT for every deposit wey your network make — no waiting, no minimum.
ecosystem.pillar3Body: Short-burst 7-day plans for members wey want faster liquidity cycles. Same daily yield logic, but timeline dey compressed.
ecosystem.pillar4Body: Earn per-view payouts for TurboLoop content. Submit your video, if dem approve am, you go collect USDT every time people watch am.
ecosystem.pillar5Body: Host weekly community Zoom sessions for your language. We go cover your operating costs — $100/month stipend paid in USDT.
ecosystem.pillar6Body: Up to $100,000 USDT for verified smart contract vulnerabilities. Open to anybody, anywhere. No NDA required.
ecosystem.metaDesc: Explore di six interconnected DeFi primitives wey dey power TurboLoop: Loop Plans, Referral Engine, Sprint Loop, Creator Economy, Local Presenter Program, and Security Bounty.

roadmap.title: Wetin dem don build. Wetin dey come.
roadmap.subtitle: Di smart contract don final and no fit change again — no new feature go enter di protocol. Di roadmap na about reach, education, and community.
roadmap.phase1Body: Smart contract don deploy, audit finish, and dem don renounce am for BSC. Loop Plans don start. Referral engine dey work.
roadmap.phase2Body: Local Presenter Program don start. Daily Zoom sessions for 12+ languages. Dem don reach 14+ countries.
roadmap.phase3Body: Film series don start. Creator payout system dey live. Social Wall dey active.
roadmap.phase4Body: Marketing Hub get 2,800+ banners for 14 languages. Blog get 2,500+ articles. Learn section dey live.
roadmap.phase5Body: Sprint Loop don launch. Dem dey prepare for token launch. Global meetups program dey.
roadmap.metaTitle: TurboLoop Roadmap — Protocol Milestones & Future Plans
roadmap.metaDesc: See wetin TurboLoop don build and wetin dey come next. Di smart contract no fit change — di roadmap na about reach, education, and community growth.

learn.title: Learn DeFi from zero.
learn.subtitle: Short explainers for people wey never touch crypto before. No big grammar, no yawa. Every one end with how e connect to TurboLoop.
learn.lesson1Body: Decentralized Finance wey dem explain for simple English. Wetin e be, why e important, and how e different from bank.
learn.lesson2Body: Code wey dey run by itself for blockchain. No middleman, no trust needed — rules dey inside the contract.
learn.lesson3Body: Crypto wey no dey waka up and down. USDT, USDC — dem pegged to dollar so your money go steady.
learn.lesson4Body: How you fit dey earn passive income by putting your stablecoins to work for DeFi protocols. How e dey work, and wetin be the risk dem.
learn.lesson5Body: Step-by-step guide to read smart contract for BscScan. Wetin you go look for, and wetin red flags mean.
learn.metaTitle: Learn DeFi — Free Beginner Guides | TurboLoop
learn.metaDesc: New to DeFi? Learn wetin yield farming be, how smart contracts dey work, wetin stablecoins be, and how to earn passive income for BSC. Free guides, no big grammar.
